name: Ur-Energy Inc.
content: Ur-Energy is a U.S. uranium mining company that operates the Lost Creek in-situ recovery (ISR) facility in Wyoming. Lost Creek is one of the lowest-cost and most efficient uranium mines in the United States. Ur-Energy is also advancing its Shirley Basin project, aiming to expand its domestic production capacity to meet the rising demand for secure, American-sourced uranium for the nuclear utility sector.
